programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play for Exercise!
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: BJ's Really Cool House
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Your Birthday, Barney
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Keep On Truckin'
programme.desc: Barney's friends Baby Bop and BJ learn about trucks as they wheel out their favorites and explore the functions and purposes of various trucks. BJ likes helping with his tow truck and Barney helps them see what it's like to be a real truck driver.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Gift Of The Dinos - Winter
programme.desc: It's Christmas and BJ dreams of getting a new baseball glove to go with his baseball, while Riff hopes for new drumsticks to use his drum. Barney reminds them that Christmas is more than just getting gifts and helps them learn the meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Stop! Go!
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. After some advice from Barney, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.
programme.sub-title: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Rabbits - Listen
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney reminds Riff and BJ that Christmas is about more than getting gifts. Barney takes Melanie on a trip to the North Pole to deliver her letter in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Moving Along
programme.desc: Barney plays a fun game of "Simon Says" with Baby Bop and BJ in the park. They demonstrate how to move their bodies through dancing and playing games.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Shock And Surprise
programme.desc: Jordan whisks Chloe away to Paris for a big portion of romance and snails! Shannon thinks she might be pregnant. It's a big day for Sassi, and Amber comes to a decision about Ste. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 8 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Unseen Moments. After the reunion fallout, Dr Drew sits down with Kailyn and Barb to check out the best unseen moments from this season.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion: Behind the Screams
programme.desc: Behind The Screams. The beef between Kailyn and Briana erupts when the cast comes to New York for reunion weekend.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: When Nova misses her dad, Briana puts her anger with DeVoin aside. Jade tries to distance herself from Sean. Leah's kids become suspicious of her possible romance with Jeremy. (S9, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Make It or Break It
programme.desc: Sean pleads with Jade to let him see Kloie. Jo throws a wrench into Kailyn's vacation plans while Leah considers what this Hawaii trip could mean for her and Jeremy. (S9, ep24)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Getting Lei'd
programme.desc: Briana celebrates Stella's birthday, Jade grows frustrated with her mother, Leah's daughters have mixed feelings about Jeremy, and Chelsea gets a creative opportunity. (S9, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Normal Parents
programme.desc: Jade's relationship with her mum deteriorates. Things for Briana and John crumble when she visits him. Ali gains independence at a camp for children with muscular dystrophy. (S9, ep26)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bailout
programme.desc: When Jade's parents are arrested, she's forced to pick up the pieces. Devoin tries to prove to Briana that he can be around for Nova. Leah welcomes Ali home from camp. (S9, ep27)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Sugar-coated Mood
programme.desc: Briana makes a major decision, leaving John sidelined. With her parents still in jail, Jade reaches to Sean for support. Chelsea's anxiety rises with the launch of her clothing design. (S9, ep28)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Don't Miss the Sunset
programme.desc: Luis reappears with a major ask for Briana. Sean's rent is late, forcing Jade to make a difficult choice. Kailyn gets upsetting news. Chelsea celebrates Aubree's 10th birthday. (S9, ep29)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bear
programme.desc: Kailyn and her boys say goodbye to the family dog. Briana confronts John about their relationship. Chelsea gets a shocking request from Adam's mum. Leah is reminded of her past with Jeremy. (S9, ep30)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 9 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Nessa and the cast of "Teen Mom 2" watch and react to never-before-seen clips from the past season.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 9 Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Dr. Drew and Nessa begin the biggest reunion ever by chatting with each of the moms, but conflict between Jenelle & Nessa leads to major drama.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 9 Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Jenelle returns to discuss her final season of TM2, Kail and Vee look back at their tumultuous past, Briana calls out Devoin, and Chelsea opens up about her post-partum issues.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 9 Reunion Part 3
programme.desc: Kailyn announces the newest member of the Teen Mom 2 cast. Jace's dad, Andrew, makes an appearance for the first time since the first Teen Mom 2 Reunion. Cole and Aubrey join Chelsea on stage.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Chelsea and Leah meet Jade and discuss their similarities. Kail defends her parenting decisions and Briana reveals where things really went wrong with John. Later, Leah is joined by Jeremy on stage.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: New Season, Old Wounds
programme.desc: Briana, frustrated by Luis' absence, tracks him down at a nightclub. After a major fight with her mum, things get even worse for Jade at Kloie's birthday party. (S10, ep1)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: About Last Night
programme.desc: Isaac makes a confession to Kailyn, prompting her to reconsider her custody agreement with Jo. Jade is forced to juggle single-parenthood while preparing for her beauty license exam. (S10, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Briana takes an STI test after her night with Luis. Chelsea takes Aubree out for a mother-daughter day. Leah and Victoria visit her boyfriend in Costa Rica. (S10, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Hello From the Other Side
programme.desc: Jade graduates beauty school but family complications threaten her big day. Chelsea guides Aubree as she considers inviting Adam to the Father/Daughter dance. (S10, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Taking Charge
programme.desc: Briana confronts Luis about her STI test results. Jade is forced to support her family after they all lose their jobs. Aubree reconsiders the Father/Daughter dance. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Izabella
programme.desc: After hiding her pregnancy for eight months, Izabella is forced to reconsider who her true friends are. She then risks her family ties when her boyfriend betrays their trust.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kianna
programme.desc: With an immature boyfriend and a distant mum, Kianna wants more stability for her baby and considers adoption. When no one supports her decision, she must figure out how to be a good parent.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Taylor
programme.desc: Taylor's mum wants her to choose adoption, but Taylor and her boyfriend Nathan feel that they can overcome the challenges of being teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Allie
programme.desc: A Jersey girl is stuck in Texas after moving in with her boyfriend's dysfunctional family, Allie needs to decide whether to raise her baby in an unstable environment or without a dad.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts an emotional finale as ten teen mothers share a stage to come together with their boyfriends and parents and talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the exclusive moments we never saw with the girls from season 3 of 16 And Pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: An in-depth look at everything that's happened since the cameras stopped rolling on the girls from the first two seasons of 16 and Pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Adoption Special
programme.desc: Dr. Drew goes in depth and explores the adoption stories of Teen Mom's Catelynn and Tyler, and 16 and Pregnant's Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with the girls of 16 And Pregnant to find where they are now.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Mackenzie
programme.desc: Mackenzie has always lived in the moment, until she has to suddenly get serious about her own life when her boyfriend is nearly paralysed in a car accident just weeks before her due date.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Katie
programme.desc: Once her days were filled with college applications and racing quad bikes with friends, but after getting pregnant, Katie has to completely rearrange her priorities.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Briana
programme.desc: Briana gets pregnant at the same time as her sister, but their relationship becomes tense when they make different decisions regarding teenage motherhood.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lindsey
programme.desc: When Lindsey unexpectedly gets pregnant, she struggles to find a stable living situation with her inconsistent boyfriend, and to follow through with her dreams.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Alex
programme.desc: Alex finding out she's pregnant at 16 puts everything on hold. Her boyfriend Matt is also growing increasingly unreliable, and Alex considers whether adoption might be the best choice.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Myranda
programme.desc: Myranda finds that love isn't the answer to everything when she gets pregnant. As her mum battles substance abuse, Myranda and her boyfriend struggle with preparing for a baby on their own.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Sarah
programme.desc: Sarah and Blake were high school sweethearts, until an unexpected pregnancy began to pull them apart. Blake wants to move away for work, but Sarah needs him to stick around for their baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Hope
programme.desc: Ex-party girl Hope is pregnant after losing her virginity to Ben, a guy she barely knows. Hope and Ben try to make a go of their relationship in order to provide a good family for the baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Sabrina
programme.desc: Sabrina used to be a cool California girl, with an athlete boyfriend and big group of friends. When she gets pregnant, Sabrina must start a new life, and hopes her boyfriend will come too.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Second Chances
programme.desc: A reformed drug addict is found dead in an alley and the CSI New York team discovers he was the victim of a premeditated plot.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Criminal Justice
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a brutal stabbing, they discover that evidence at the crime scene was planted which pits them against a trusted colleague.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Flag on the Play
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the lingerie league is found murdered in a hot tub, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Sanguine Love
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in Central Park the CSI New York team is lured into the mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Formula
programme.desc: When a car racing legend dies in a fiery explosion, the CSI New York team of investigators discovers that car tampering is the cause.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Uncertainty Rules
programme.desc: When four victims are found dead in a hotel room and the main suspect turns up wielding an ax, the CSIs try to piece together the details.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Inside
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a basement, but the house where the death occurred is found miles away on a barge in the East River. Meanwhile, Flack discovers that his sister lost her job and has a drinking problem.

programme.title: CSI: New York: My Name Is Mac Taylor
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Triangle
programme.desc: CSI investigates the death of a armored truck security guard, which appears to be related to a disturbance at a so-called "Bermuda Triangle" of electric activity near the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rush To Judgment
programme.desc: While investigating the death and dismemberment of a high school wrestling coach, detective Flack gets in trouble when a suspect dies in his custody.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Green Piece
programme.desc: An environmental terrorist group bombs the home of an electronics recycler, and his daughter is killed--but the daughter is part of the terrorist group. Meanwhile, Danny considers proposing to Lindsay again.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe who were some of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prey
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Past, Present and Murder
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him? During the investigation, Mac discovers that the case is connected to an earlier case involving a missing flash drive.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Greater Good
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labor, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pay Up
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify to a grand jury against his father, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Blacklist (Featuring Gravedigger)
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health-care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: While investigating the DNA from a murder scene, Hawkes discovers that the DNA is connected to more than a dozen cases over a three-state area. But does the city really have a serial killer on their hands, or is there another explanation?

programme.title: CSI: New York: Battle Scars
programme.desc: CSI investigates the homicide of a competitive street dancer, which leads the team to an unlikely killer who has a shocking motive.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realizes it's the third victim of the Compass Killer. Meanwhile, detective Flack, still dealing with Angell's death, goes AWOL.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going , Going, Gone
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a deadly plot against the City of Miami after a young woman is murdered at a charity event. He and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Come As You Are
programme.desc: When a Marine recruiter is murdered, the CSIs must delve into the world of enlisting soldiers and the families they leave behind.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Backstabbers
programme.desc: Sonya Barak is standing trial for aiding in a plot to destroy Miami when her own people try to gun her down. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Throwing Heat
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: No Man's Land
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Man Down
programme.desc: A member of the team is pronounced dead after being shot in the head. Not wanting to give up, Horatio has the CSI rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Down To The Wire
programme.desc: A notorious private investigator becomes a central figure in an investigation into a phony 911 call that ends in death, and he uses information he's gathered about Calleigh and Eric to get them thrown off the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: From The Grave
programme.desc: The team must find the connection between the two crime scenes: the killing of a drug dealer and the rape of an affluent family's housekeeper who happens to be pregnant.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: When a rich family is trapped on a burning yacht in shark-infested waters, the CSI's must investigate how it happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: 48 Hours To Life
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are trying to figure out how to free an innocent young man after a harsh interrogation with Frank Tripp sends him to jail.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Three-Way
programme.desc: Three suburban housewives on a girls' weekend in Miami are the prime suspects when the hotel's handsome pool boy is found murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: The CSI team must race against time when all evidence in a murder case points to Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Felony Flight
programme.desc: A convicted serial killer escapes after sabotaging an airplane that was flying him from New York to Miami, where he allegedly buried a body.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Nailed
programme.desc: The CSI team are called out to investigate the murder of a young woman who was about to sign her divorce papers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Urban Hellraisers
programme.desc: Eric finds himself in the middle of a robbery while at the bank. The team soon learns that the bank robbery is part of a video game called "Urban Hellraisers" being played out in real life.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Shattered
programme.desc: A drug lord is gunned in his Coconut Grove mansion and a suspect arrested at the scene claims he sells marijuana to Delko. Rick Stetler, from Internal Affairs, investigates and the case quickly becomes personal when Horatio gets involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: The Score
programme.desc: The CSI team investigate the brutal murder of a man who was learning how to pick up women. Meanwhile, Horatio tries to help out Marisol, Delko's sister, who was arrested on drug charges.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Silencer
programme.desc: The Mala Noche strike again and it's up to the CSI team to bring them down once and for all. Major secrets are revealed about the characters and their personal lives.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Fade Out
programme.desc: When evidence shows that a series of murders is linked to organized crime, Horatio and the team are instead lead to a pair of film students who possess a screenplay containing the details of the crimes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Skeletons
programme.desc: When Horatio's nemesis, Walter Resden, targets someone from their past, Horatio tries to stop him. Delko's relationship with Natalia is tested when she thinks she may be pregnant.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.
programme.sub-title: The Night Stalker: Summer of Terror (Part 1)

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I Will Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.
programme.sub-title: The Night Stalker: I Will Be Avenged (Part 2)

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-ed Killer: The Murder Capital of the World (Part 1)
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.
programme.sub-title: The Co-ed Killer: The Murder Capital of the World (Part 1)

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.
programme.sub-title: The Co-ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago’s St. Patrick’s Day celebration was cut short when Becky Klien disappeared. The search for the truth turned into a murder mystery, complete with sex, drugs, and true love gone awry.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Missoula
programme.desc: In 2007, Anne Stout was a devoted mother living the Rocky Mountain dream until her husband turned up dead in their Missoula home. A few scraps of unlikely evidence would reveal the truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: The Millers: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Carol has the worst Mother's Day ever when Nathan forgets to get her a present.

programme.title: The Millers: Movin' Out (Carol's Song)
programme.desc: Carol begins her search for a new apartment, causing Nathan and Debbie to race each other to find her a place that is the farthest away from each of them.

programme.title: The Millers: CON-Troversy
programme.desc: Nathan is assigned to cover a Sci-Fi Fest for his workplace and runs into a famous book author who has hated him since grade school.

programme.title: The Millers: Reunited and It Feels So Bad
programme.desc: Tom and Carol decide to formally end their marriage but are surprised when they both hesitate to finalize the divorce, sending Nathan and Debbie into a panic at the thought of their parents reconciling.
programme.sub-title: Reunited and It Feels So Bad

programme.title: The Millers: Give Metta World Peace a Chance
programme.desc: Nathan lands the biggest interview of his career with professional basketball player Metta World Peace, but when karma catches up with him, he risks ruining his professional reputation.
programme.sub-title: Give Metta World Peace a Chance

programme.title: The Millers: Diggin' Up Bones
programme.desc: In an attempt to get Carol to be more daring, Kip encourages her to confront her old Central Elementary School work nemesis, Miss Pam (Molly Shannon), at the teacher's retirement party.

programme.title: The Millers: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man
programme.desc: When Ray points out that Nathan has a history of being the worst wingman ever, Nathan embarks on a mission to be a better friend by becoming less self-involved.
programme.sub-title: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man

programme.title: The Millers: When The Pope Comes Marching In
programme.desc: When the Pope is scheduled to come to town, Nathan's planned week-long series of reports hits a snag when Ray gets a job offer to become the cameraman for a rival field reporter.
programme.sub-title: When The Pope Comes Marching In

programme.title: The Millers: Papa Was a Rolling Bone
programme.desc: The Millers decide to spend Thanksgiving apart for the first time ever, but they rethink the new family tradition when all their individual Turkey Day plans hit unexpected snags.

programme.title: The Millers: Louise Louise
programme.desc: When The Millers get a visit from their elderly Aunt Louise (Cloris Leachman), they rally to help her figure out what her legacy will be when she worries that she hasn't left her mark on the world yet.

programme.title: The Millers: Highway to the Manger Zone
programme.desc: When staging their church's annual living nativity scene does not go as planned, Kip urges the Millers to stage their own rival show.

programme.title: The Millers: Hero
programme.desc: When Nathan decides he should have a better relationship with his niece Mikayla, he agrees to use his celebrity status to help Debbie and Adam get her into a popular school.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly and Eden date two charming French men who shower them with gifts and glamorous living, they wonder if their dream dates are too good to be true. Phil and Haskell train Stuart on how to confront a bully at the bar.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil opens his own agency and enlists Eden as his temporary assistant to help sign his first client. Meanwhile, Holly hires Haskell as her temporary assistant. Stuart pursues the Yelper who smeared his practice's perfect rating.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates a much younger man and Eden questions his motives. Phil and Eden secretly become friends with benefits. Stuart convinces Haskell to pursue a woman he's admired from afar and ends up accidentally stealing her cat.
programme.sub-title: The Hand That Rocks the Cradle

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly attends her ex-boyfriend Paul's wedding and throws it into chaos. At the wedding Phil and Eden realize they're developing feelings for each other. Haskell sets his sights on the most desperate woman at the wedding.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Eden shares a secret about herself and Phil with Holly, who blabs to Stuart and Haskell, testing boundaries within the group.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart's sister Nicki (Leah Remini) shows up with some shocking news about her marriage. Phil and Eden consider bringing a guest into the bedroom.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Eden's relationship is strained when he is named one of the top ten bachelors in New York City and has to pretend to be single. Stuart dates the twin sister of his evil ex, Sabrina.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Nicki (Leah Remini) returns to start her new life in the city, disrupting Stuart's professional life and Phil's personal life. Haskell and Eden attend an all-nude production of "Twelve Angry Men."

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell hatches a plan to win over Nicki. Stuart and Phil visit Stuart's old home one last time before it is sold.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil unknowingly sleeps with a nun and must keep Nicki from finding out. Haskell and Eden take care of a fussy Holly after she suffers an injury.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidentally sets Haskell up with a gay man. Stuart helps Phil get over his fear of funerals.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart asks Nicki to accompany him to an important dinner. Phil and Haskell consider getting vasectomies together.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates an older man only to find he lives in an assisted living facility. Nicki comes to Phil with a proposition.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man and the Holly

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: In the wake of Haskell declaring his love for Nicki, Holly tries to play cupid. Stuart secretly arranges for Phil to get together with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly represents Nicki in her divorce, but lets her own history with marriage get in the way. Phil tries to prove he’s not getting older by dating a much younger woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly joins a grief support group to meet a man. Stuart and Haskell help prepare Phil for a talk show appearance after he develops a lisp.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.
programme.sub-title: An Officer and a Dental Man

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly throws a birthday party for Stuart and Nicki, but her real motive is to impress a guy she's just met who's new in town. Nicki and Stuart's dad shows up and ruins everything.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell plans to attend a big event honoring him for his past bowling glory, but is quarantined with Phil and Stuart. Holly secretly rewrites Eden's college paper and almost destroys her dream.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani
programme.desc: Oscar reluctantly agrees with his agent that it's time to shake things up on his radio show and allows Dani to have a bigger role after a rival host, Rich Eisen, taunts him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: A Dinner Engagement
programme.desc: Felix attempts to reverse Emily's birthday curse and plans a nice dinner to celebrate with friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All The Residents' Men
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix run a heated campaign for President of their building's tenants' association, but Oscar doesn't fully realize everything the position entails.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Murph persuades Oscar to try online dating, Oscar finds himself on a blind date with Felix's ex-wife, Ashley (Christine Woods).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: London Calling
programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 63
programme.desc: Twin sisters who lost their parents as pre-teens are chopped apart by finances and jealousy and Judge Rhonda must decode the anger over caring for a toddler to pull their sisterhood back together.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 95
programme.desc: A mother at the end of her rope drags her son in front of Judge Rhonda, hoping to get back the $1,100 he stole from her bank account.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 5
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda settles the score between twin models who can even fool their photographer.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 60
programme.desc: A tribute tattoo for her late father brings a grieving daughter and her tattoo artist cousin into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A covid outbreak at her chicken factory job drives a young woman trying to protect her mom who suffers with MS into Judge Rhonda's court.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: She thought the sneaker deal with her cousin was a slam dunk, but when he held on to her bank card and kept charging new shoes she ran, like a full court press, to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 33
programme.desc: Drag Queens married to each other face Judge Rhonda over a beautiful performance garment that just doesn't fit anymore.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple together for eight years share a son and a home, but when she finds out he has another child and other women Judge Rhonda is called into play.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 87
programme.desc: An estranged couple who can't even decide if they want to stay together bring their 5 year dispute to Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: When her brother's "linebacker" wife had him arrested for a tussel, this sister bailed him out and put him up for three months; Judge Rhonda handles the bill.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 78
programme.desc: When Dad's Bernese Mountain dog gives his son's nose a nasty bite, their strained relationship is put to the test in Judge Rhonda's court.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episdoe 50
programme.desc: Love at first sight in a sober living house got complicated; she found a new love and he sold her generator so Judge Rhonda must generate a simple solution.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 130
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda confronts a marriage on-the-rocks with accusations of cheating on both sides, drug-use and a baby caught in the middle.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 48
programme.desc: When a man brings his transgender fiance into court, Judge Rhonda confronts his mom who may be the cause of their dispute.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 24
programme.desc: A housing situation that was "tore up from the floor up" brings a pair who lived together into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 17
programme.desc: Her son's bad Marriage in London causes a mother to drag him home; now she wants Judge Rhonda to make the young man pay her back.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 93
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda is shocked by a DJ who claims that when a cousin who has been doing her hair since middle school, braided her head so tightly that her scalp was bleeding and scabby, she suffered hair-loss and now has a big bald spot.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 23
programme.desc: A Daughter faces off with her Father in Judge Rhonda's court over a loan he says he can never repay.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 99
programme.desc: It is no laughing matter for Judge Rhonda when a comedian won't pay her cousin back for a $5,000 loan after a smash and grab car thief took her cash and gun.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 75
programme.desc: A designer handbag trampled at a party drags two close cousins into court where Judge Rhonda must figure out if the purse is real or a fake.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 51
programme.desc: Sisters appear before Judge Rhonda with an allegation of credit card theft and a polygraph test helps the Judge uncover the truth.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 21
programme.desc: Cousins who live together can't agree over groceries and toilet tissue, Judge Rhonda has to unwrap this mess.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 128
programme.desc: Brothers from a big musical family slam into a sour note over a broken car, broken tools, and ask Judge Rhonda to fix practically everything but the kitchen sink in the house they share.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Their mothers were sisters who didn't speak to each other, and now these cousins are not speaking over money one claims the other spent on paying men to sleep with her; Judge Rhonda is on the case.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 79
programme.desc: Growing up in foster care, she survived tragedy and tried to take care of her baby brother; now she needs Judge Rhonda's help to make him take his future seriously and pay her back.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A two-month courtship led to an eight-month marriage which brought two old friends into Judge Rhonda's court fighting about stimulus money and a child custody lawyer.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple who share seven children and a thriving protein shake business come infront of Judge Rhonda to solve the mystery of a broken Playstation.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 104
programme.desc: A celebrity wardrobe stylist says his "influencer" cousin failed to pay for a photoshoot he pulled together and Judge Rhonda must decide who has been taken to the cleaners.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 55
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda confronts a family in crisis with a mother trying to protect her daughter from the man she lives with; violence and heartbreak are consuming this family.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 103
programme.desc: They met when she was 16, now thirteen years and three children later, their marriage is on the rocks because he parties and pursues his dreams, so she presents Judge Rhonda with the support contract she wants enforced

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 97
programme.desc: Sisters with a terrific relationship are torn apart by a two-year old being a toddler, and Judge Rhonda calls a foul on their bickering.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 37
programme.desc: Two comedians with the same last name find out they are halfbrothers when they happen to work together, but a rude joke about one of their mothers brings them into Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 137
programme.desc: Sisters who grew up in separate households became "petty partners" as adults are in Judge Rhonda's courtroom squabbling over a girl trip to Puerto Rico that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 76
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces the case of a man who thinks the rent and utilities he provided for his pregnant girlfriend because she could not work as an exotic dancer was a loan she should pay back.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 53
programme.desc: Her nephew, the make-up artist who specializes in gore, left her car a "bloody" mess after he hit a tree on the way to work and she wants Judge Rhonda to make him clean up the damage.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 29
programme.desc: An Exotic Dancer and her cousin the photographer sashay into Judge Rhonda's court at odds over who should pay for the pictures

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 150
programme.desc: Family squabbles can become destructive, especially when money is involved.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 57
programme.desc: A comedian claims his cousin the canibus festival promoter didn't pay for his performance; Judge Rhonda weeds through the facts for her verdict.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 41
programme.desc: When a Carpenter sees on social media that his cousin has been building her best life instead of paying him back he constructs a case for Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 133
programme.desc: A Fairy Tale romance goes horribly wrong when a former lover enters the picture and Judge Rhonda must solve the mystery of a birthstone engagement ring that is lost forever.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Judge Rhonda's Court cousins squabble over an expensive laptop that one claims fell out of the back of a rental SUV.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 28
programme.desc: Mother and Daughter face off in Judge Rhonda's courtroom over a secret breast augmentation surgery.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 64
programme.desc: When an older sister became the legal "mother" for her two young sisters, she and her husband paid all of their bills; now that one is a grown exotic dancer money makes them face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 80
programme.desc: An identical twin and her mother accuse a twin sister of burning down her own home for the insurance money in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Little Murder
programme.desc: Grissom suspects murder when the body of a dwarf is found hanging from a rope high above a stage in a casino hotel where a convention of little people is being held.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Abra Cadaver
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Sara investigate when a woman vanishes while taking part in a magician's act.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Execution Of Catherine Willows
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Catherine helped put a man on death row for the rape and murder of a coed at a nearby college. The man is about to be executed when he's granted a stay based on new DNA evidence.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fight Night
programme.desc: A boxing champ dies in the ring after taking a brutal beating from his nemesis, but Grissom finds evidence that points to murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Snuff
programme.desc: Catherine is called in by a pornographic-film developer to view graphic footage from a snuff movie in which a woman is brutally slain.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Face Lift
programme.desc: A thief is found dead from blunt force trauma to his head in a pottery store where he was evidently trying to crack a safe. The team dusts the store and finds the fingerprint of a girl who has been missing for the last 20 years.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: $35K O.B.O.
programme.desc: A couple who walk out of a fancy restaurant to their car are attacked and killed. When the team arrives on the scene, the only eyewitness is a young man who stayed behind to give his statements.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sounds Of Silence
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick investigate the apparent hit and run of a young man who they soon discover was deaf. Meanwhile, Nick and Catherine are attempting to solve a mass murder in a coffee shop.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Justice Is Served
programme.desc: Catherine gets emotionally involved while investigating the death of a six-year-old girl at a carnival. Grissom, Nick and Warick take on the case of a jogger who was apparently attacked by an animal who knows how to use a scalpel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Burked
programme.desc: Tony Braun, the son of Las Vegas mogul Sam Braun, is found dead in his home, apparently victim of a drug overdose. But as the scene lacks all evidence normally connected to an overdose, the team soon suspects murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: The detectives hunt for clues relating to a missing college freshman. Their hope of finding her alive diminishes as all of their leads on her turn cold.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Overload
programme.desc: A construction worker falls off a tall building but forensics determines that he died prior to the fall. Another case involves a boy who suffocates to death at his therapist's house late in the night.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Bully For You
programme.desc: When Barry Shickle is murdered in the bathroom of his school, Grissom, Catherine and Warrick investigate the case. They learn from the school counselor that Barry was a cruel bully. The victims of his bullying become the CSI's prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Scuba Doobie-doo
programme.desc: A scuba diver is found dead, fully equipped with an oxygen tank, on a tree in a burned forest.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Alter Boys
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at a spa while a young man is found burying dead bodies.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Caged
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a locked room while another died when her car is hit by a train.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: A casino is brutally robbed by four trigger-happy men wearing wigs. Painstaking identification efforts lead to ex-con serial killer Tammy Felton and accomplices, but one by one they are found murdered themselves.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Ellie
programme.desc: The investigation of the death of a petty con man and drug mule leads the CSI team to Brass' daughter Ellie.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Organ Grinder
programme.desc: When businessman Robert Fairmont is found almost dead in a hotel elevator, the CSI team assume the case. They find evidence of heavy metal poisoning. When they look for the corpse, it has been cremated and the organs donated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: You’ve Got Male
programme.desc: When a young woman riding a horse finds a body of a woman inside a pipe in a construction site, Grissom and his team investigate the murder. Soon they find another woman's body and coroner Dr. Albert 'Al' Robbins notes that the women were sisters.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Jennifer Pan witnessed the murder of her mother and the attempted murder of her father. But when he wakes from a coma, her father has a very different story to tell.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When a criminal on probation embarks on a killing spree of ex-lovers, police try to get ahead of the man who will later insist that he is a victim and that society is to blame.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: How do the FBI find a killer with no victim or geographic profile and who covers his trail with counter forensics. And if they can find him, how would they prove responsibility?

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murders of Sam Herr and Julie Kibuishi, both shot for financial gain by a former theatre actor who was planning an expensive wedding despite being deeply in debt.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the 2013 murder of taxi driver William Spiller, who was brutally stabbed to death before being dismembered and stored in boxes that were used as a TV stand.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the case of 23-year-old Marta Ligman, a delicatessen worker who was found in a suitcase in London's Grand Union Canal after being attacked in 2015.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the 1997 murder of Dawn Hacheney, whose husband set fire to their family home in Washington State, hoping the blaze would be treated as an accident.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Steve Keogh reflects on the challenges police faced during their investigation into the 2015 murders of actress Sian Blake and her two sons by her husband, Arthur Simpson-Kent.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Steve Keogh looks back at the highly nuanced investigation into the 2013 murder of 17-year-old Champion Ganda, whose fatal stabbing shocked her East London community.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detectives Keogh and Dickie investigate the 2000 murder of Tom Cressman by his lover, Jane Andrews, a former royal dresser who went on the run before claiming in her defence that she had been in an abusive relationship.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Former detective inspector Keogh and the team investigate the murder of retired nurse Eulin Hastings, revealing how police inquiries led to the conviction of serial burglar Aaron Fyle.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Former detective Steve Keogh uncovers secrets in Terry Daddow's 1991 contract killing.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Laila Rezk was discovered badly beaten in her own home, she died despite all efforts to revive her. Forensic examination eliminated all traces of fingerprints, except one.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When police found a man on fire, they assumed he did that to himself. His family campaigned for justice for two years and New Scotland Yard re-investigated the case.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Gagandip Singh's body was discovered in a burnt-out car, detectives found out that his father was murdered on a business trip - was there a connection between both deaths?

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When barman David Morley was beaten to death on London's South Bank, lead detective Nick Scola deduced that the attack was not what it first appeared to be.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When Geeta Aulakh was fatally attacked on the way to pick up her children, detectives tried to find a motive. The case took a new direction after an informant came forward.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When a string of elderly people were found dead in their beds across south London, New Scotland Yard detectives realised they had a serial killer on their hands.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: German Bomber In Liverpool
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII militaria expert Stephen Taylor unearth artefacts from former military sites - starting with a German bomber found in Liverpool.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: WW1 Special
programme.desc: To mark 100 years since the end of the Great War, Suggs and Stephen excavate the site of a huge World War One transit camp at Morn Hill, outside Winchester.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII expert Stephen hunt for souvenirs left by flying ace Douglas Bader and the legendary Duxford Fliers.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Hull Blitz
programme.desc: Stephen Taylor and Suggs are up to their knees in mud in Lincolnshire as they dig up the remains of a Bolton Paul Defiant plane, shot down during the Hull Blitz.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Tank in a Vineyard
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen continue their hunt for buried WWII treasure, and discover a tank buried in a vineyard.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Top Secret Arms Depot
programme.desc: In Weedon Bec, Suggs and Stephen unearth a wealth of WW2 relics as they uncover the very secret past of a top secret arms supply depot.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: 82nd Airborne and German POWs
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen go in search of relics from the United States' elite 82nd airborne infantry division.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Spitfire
programme.desc: Treasure Hunters Suggs and Stephen Taylor are on the trail of an iconic Mark IX Spitfire in Belgium.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: American Bombers in Suffolk
programme.desc: In WW2, Suffolk was home to 32 airfields that served as stations for US bombers. Suggs and Stephen hunt for relics of the visiting aircraft.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Forgotten Bomber
programme.desc: The WW2 Treasure Hunters are in Northern France looking for the remains of an RAF Fairey Battle bomber plane shot down during the days after Dunkirk.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: D-Day Undercover
programme.desc: Suggs and WW2 expert Stephen uncover more historical finds across the UK, this time looking for relics of the 1944 D-Day operation.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Pathfinder
programme.desc: The WW2 Treasure Hunters are in Cambridgeshire on the former airbase of the Pathfinders Force - the elite flying team whose WW2 exploits were kept top secret.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Bomb Factory
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen are back on the hunt for more relics from World War 2, and hope searching the site of a bomb factory won't yield anything too explosive.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: D-Day Dress Rehearsal
programme.desc: In 1944, the south-west of England was packed with American troops training for D-Day. Suggs and Stephen discover more about this friendly invasion.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: American Fly Boys
programme.desc: Suggs and WW2 militaria expert Stephen Taylor bring forgotten stories of World War II back to life by unearthing artefacts from sites across the UK.

programme.title: Hitler's War: The Fall Of France
programme.desc: The Fall of France: By May 1940, Europe had been at war for nine months. Yet Britain and France declared war on Germany in September 1939 following Hitler's attack on Poland.

programme.title: Hitler's War: The Battle Of Britain
programme.desc: The Battle of Britain: Taking place between August and September 1940, The Battle of Britain remains one of the most famous battles of World War Two.

programme.title: Hitler's War: Desert War
programme.desc: Desert War: Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of devastating victories, the Germans delay and the fierce Russian winter takes a grip.

programme.title: Hitler's War: Stalingrad
programme.desc: Stalingrad: The Battle of Stalingrad is considered by many historians to be the turning point in World War Two in Europe, where the German army was bled dry in Russia.

programme.title: Hitler's War: Normandy to The Rhine
programme.desc: Normandy To The Rhine: The Western Allies of World War II launched the largest amphibious invasion in history when they assaulted Normandy, on 6 June 1944.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Tormented By Shadows
programme.desc: Know true fear when you hear three eerie stories about vengeful spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Possessed

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Hear frightening stories of hauntings that become dangerously violent.
